evals.prompt: Please index my git repos. Note: AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT is set to ~/code/ceridwen/repo-index/evals/fixtures/code.
evals.expected_output: A valid repos.json written to the scratch directory containing alpha (Node.js), beta (Go), delta (unknown), and gamma (Python), sorted alphabetically by name. Paths use the $AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT prefix. A summary table is shown to the user.
expectations: The output repos.json matches evals/fixtures/expected/eval-0.json exactly
The skill asked whether any repos should be excluded before collecting metadata
A summary table of the indexed repos is shown to the user

evals.prompt: Index my repos. Note: AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT is set to ~/code/ceridwen/repo-index/evals/fixtures/code.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects that the output file already exists and asks whether to overwrite or merge before proceeding. It does not scan or write anything until the user answers.
expectations: The skill detects that the output file already exists
The skill asks the user to choose between overwrite and merge
The skill does not run find-repos.sh or collect-metadata.py before the user answers

evals.prompt: Merge a fresh scan into my repos index. Note: AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT is set to ~/code/ceridwen/repo-index/evals/fixtures/code.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads the existing repos.json (which has gamma with a stale remote URL, and omega which no longer exists on disk), scans, and writes a merged result sorted alphabetically by name. gamma's remote_url is updated. omega is preserved. alpha, beta, and delta are added.
expectations: The output repos.json matches evals/fixtures/expected/eval-2.json exactly
The skill reads the existing repos.json before scanning

evals.prompt: Index my repos. Leave out beta and delta. Note: AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT is set to ~/code/ceridwen/repo-index/evals/fixtures/code.
evals.expected_output: The skill discovers all 4 repos, presents the list, excludes beta and delta per the user's instruction, and writes a repos.json containing only alpha and gamma sorted alphabetically.
expectations: The output repos.json matches evals/fixtures/expected/eval-3.json exactly
The skill presents the full list of discovered repos to the user
The skill confirms which repos will be excluded before proceeding

evals.prompt: Can you catalog my git repos? Note: AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT is not set.
evals.expected_output: The skill recognises that AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT is not set, stops immediately, and tells the user to add 'export AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT=...' to their shell config and start a new shell session.
expectations: The skill checks for AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT and finds it is not set
The skill stops without scanning or asking for a folder
The skill tells the user to set AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT in their shell config

evals.prompt: Index my repos. Overwrite if a repos index already exists. Note: AGENTS_REPOS_ROOT is set to ~/code/ceridwen/repo-index/evals/fixtures/code.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects the existing file, overwrites it with a fresh scan, and produces a repos.json containing exactly alpha, beta, delta, and gamma sorted alphabetically. The stale gamma remote URL and the omega entry from the original file are gone.
expectations: The output repos.json matches evals/fixtures/expected/eval-5.json exactly
